sourceList.title: Nobiliário das Famílias de Portugal, Tomo 11, pág.30, (Castros).

Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - Infante don SANCHO Ramírez de Aragón, son of RAMIRO I King of Aragon & his first wife Gerberge [Ermesenda] de Foix ([1042/43]-Huesca 4 Jun 1094, bur Montearagón, transferred to Monastery of San Juan de la Peña).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Conde Caballero Garcia Ordoñez de Aza Y de Nájera於1050年出生在西班牙拉 利奧亞時，他的父親Rey Ramiro Sánchez I de Aragón44歲，母親Geberge Ermesinda de Foix36歲。他於大約1076年與Felicia of Roucy結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1108年5月29日在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈昆卡享年58歲，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈昆卡。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Conde Caballero Garcia Ordoñez de Aza Y de Nájera于1050年出生在西班牙拉 利奧亞时，他的父亲Rey Ramiro Sánchez I de Aragón44岁，母亲Geberge Ermesinda de Foix36岁。他于大约1076年与Felicia of Roucy结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1108年5月29日在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈昆卡享年58岁，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈昆卡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aza
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: habitational name from a place called Aza or Haza in Burgos province. Compare   De Aza  .

Japanese: rare name from Fukushima prefecture usually written 呰 ‘slander’, but the character could be a miswriting of 此口 Konokuchi, another rare name meaning ‘this opening’. Another possibility also pronounced Aza could be 字 ‘(one from a) rural district’.

variants.name: De Aza
meanings: Spanish: variant of Aza , with the preposition de ‘from’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nájera
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Jesus, Miguel, Manuel, Francisco, Guadalupe, Carlos, Mario, Pedro, Raul, Roberto.
Spanish (Nájera): habitational name from Nájera, a city in La Rioja province.

nameMeanings.name: Garcia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin. See Grace .

nameMeanings.name: Ordoñez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Luis, Juan, Jorge, Manuel, Mario, Jesus, Miguel, Cesar, Javier, Fernando.
Spanish (Ordóñez): patronymic from the medieval personal name Ordoño, of uncertain origin and meaning.

variants.name: Ordones
meanings: Hispanic (Ordoñes): altered form of Spanish Ordóñez (see Ordonez ).

variants.name: Ordoyne
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Emile, Eulice, Raoul, Remy.
Altered form, under the French influence in LA, of Spanish Ordóñez (see Ordonez ).

en.lifeSummary: When Conde Caballero Garcia Ordoñez de Aza Y de Nájera was born in 1050, in La Rioja, Spain, his father, Rey Ramiro Sánchez I de Aragón, was 44 and his mother, Geberge Ermesinda de Foix, was 36. He married Felicia of Roucy about 1076. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 29 May 1108, in Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain, at the age of 58, and was buried in Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Conde Caballero Garcia Ordoñez de Aza Y de Nájera est né en 1050, à La Rioja, Espagne, son père, Rey Ramiro Sánchez I de Aragón, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Geberge Ermesinda de Foix, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Felicia of Roucy environ 1076. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 29 mai 1108, à Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Conde Caballero Garcia Ordoñez de Aza Y de Nájera 1050 in La Rioja, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rey Ramiro Sánchez I de Aragón 44 und seine Mutter Geberge Ermesinda de Foix 36. Er hat um 1076 Felicia of Roucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 29. Mai 1108 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien und wurde in Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Conde Caballero Garcia Ordoñez de Aza Y de Nájera è nato il nel 1050 nel La Rioja, Spagna, il suo padre, Rey Ramiro Sánchez I de Aragón, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Geberge Ermesinda de Foix, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Felicia of Roucy circa 1076. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 29 maggio 1108, nel Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Conde Caballero Garcia Ordoñez de Aza Y de Nájeraが1050年にスペインラ リオジャで生まれた時，父Rey Ramiro Sánchez I de Aragónは44歳，母Geberge Ermesinda de Foixは36歳であった。約1076年にFelicia of Roucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1108年5月29日にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャクウエンカで58歳で死去し，スペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャクウエンカにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Conde Caballero Garcia Ordoñez de Aza Y de Nájera(이)가 1050년 스페인 라 리오자에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rey Ramiro Sánchez I de Aragón(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Geberge Ermesinda de Foix(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1076년 Felicia of Roucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1108년 5월 29일 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 c카에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 c카에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Conde Caballero Garcia Ordoñez de Aza Y de Nájera nasceu em 1050, em La Rioja, Espanha, seu pai, Rey Ramiro Sánchez I de Aragón, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Geberge Ermesinda de Foix, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Felicia of Roucy aproximadamente 1076. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 29 de maio de 1108, em Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Conde Caballero Garcia Ordoñez de Aza Y de Nájera родился в 1050 г. в местности ла риоджа, Испания, его отцу по имени Rey Ramiro Sánchez I de Aragón было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Geberge Ermesinda de Foix, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Felicia of Roucy около 1076 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 29 мая 1108 г. в местности куенка, кастилла-ла манча, Испания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности куенка, кастилла-ла манча, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Conde Caballero Garcia Ordoñez de Aza Y de Nájera nació en 1050, en La Rioja, España, su papá, Rey Ramiro Sánchez I de Aragón, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Geberge Ermesinda de Foix, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Felicia of Roucy aproximadamente 1076. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 29 de mayo de 1108, en Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, España, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, España.
